zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Roger II Brett , Lord of Walton於1260年出生在英國德比夏爾沃爾頓時，他的父親Jordan le Brett II34歲，母親Joanna de Heriz20歲。他與Bamburga Roberta de Deincourt結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1332年11月6日在英國德比夏爾沃爾頓享年72歲。

nameMeanings.name: Brett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Heinz, Horst, Konrad, Otto, Reimund.
German: occupational name for a sawyer, Middle High German bretsnīder. Compare Bretthauer .

variants.name: Bretschneider
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Fritz, Ilse, Oskar.

variants.name: Bretthauer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Elfriede, Ewald, Kurt.
German: occupational name for a sawyer, from Middle High German bret ‘board’ + houwer ‘cutter, chopper’. Compare Brettschneider .

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Roger II Brett , Lord of Walton was born in 1260, in Walton, Derbyshire, England, his father, Jordan le Brett II, was 34 and his mother, Joanna de Heriz, was 20. He married Bamburga Roberta de Deincourt. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 6 November 1332, in Walton, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Roger II Brett , Lord of Walton est né en 1260, à Walton, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Jordan le Brett II, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Joanna de Heriz, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Bamburga Roberta de Deincourt. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 6 novembre 1332, à Walton, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 72 ans.

Er hat Bamburga Roberta de Deincourt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 6. November 1332 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Walton, Derbyshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Roger II Brett , Lord of Waltonが1260年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアワルトンで生まれた時，父Jordan le Brett IIは34歳，母Joanna de Herizは20歳であった。Bamburga Roberta de Deincourtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1332年11月6日にイギリスデルブイシュアイアワルトンで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Roger II Brett , Lord of Walton(이)가 1260년 영국 더비실르 월턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jordan le Brett II(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Joanna de Heriz(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Bamburga Roberta de Deincourt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1332년 11월 6일 영국 더비실르 월턴에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Roger II Brett , Lord of Walton родился в 1260 г. в местности валтон, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Jordan le Brett II было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Joanna de Heriz, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Bamburga Roberta de Deincourt. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 6 ноября 1332 г. в местности валтон, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 72 лет.
